name: HIGHWOODS PROPERTIES, INC.
business: Highwoods Properties, Inc. is a fully integrated office real estate investment trust that owns, develops, acquires, leases and manages office properties primarily in the best business districts of Atlanta, Charlotte, Dallas, Nashville, Orlando, Raleigh, Richmond and Tampa. The company sells office space leasing to a diverse base of business customers. As of December 31, 2025, the company owned 109.5 million of 111.5 million total common units in its operating partnership.
